name: Galactic Warship
short_description: I always wanted to play an action game where I could take direct control of a capital ship in 3D space. One day, I decided to make that game. As a solo developer I spent two years crafting Galactic Warship - letting you pilot massive capital warships in full 3D with complete 6-axis freedom.
detailed_description:
I always wanted to play an action game where I could take direct control of a capital ship in 3D space. Not fake 3D where you're on the same plane, actual 6-Axis Freedom of Movement. One day, I decided to make that game. As a solo developer, I poured two years into crafting Galactic Warship, letting you pilot massive capital-class warships in full 3D with complete 6-axis freedom. You'll unlock dozens of ships, each armed with powerful, customizable weapons, as you face waves of enemies and insane bosses from outside our reality.

Full Command of Capital-Class Warships: Finally, a game that puts the full weight of commanding these massive ships in your hands. Navigate, dodge, and engage in epic battles, with the freedom to move on all six axes.

A Growing Arsenal to Match the Threat: As you progress, you’ll gain access to an ever-expanding array of ships and weapons to suit your style. Progression is constant, every sector you complete unlocks a permanent upgrade that will help you on your next run.  
   
Infinite Replayability: No two runs will be the same, and I will be adding new missions, ships, and features with the help of player feedback.
